steps.name: live-provider-matrix
steps.note: Live provider matrix disabled (set TERRA_ENABLE_LIVE_PROVIDER_TESTS=1 to execute).

steps.name: perf-terra
steps.note: Runs Terra inference/streaming overhead gates (p50<=3%, p95<=7%).

steps.name: perf-http
steps.note: Runs HTTP stream parser overhead gate (p50<=3%, p95<=7%).

steps.name: perf-tracemacapp
steps.note: Runs TraceMacApp timeline compaction/render-prep overhead gate (p50<=3%, p95<=7%).

steps.name: compliance-stress
steps.note: Runs concurrent compliance suppression determinism stress.

steps.name: otlp-reject-stress
steps.note: Runs mixed allow/reject/schema OTLP stress and verifies deterministic 200/403/400 outcomes.

steps.name: stream-invariants
steps.note: Runs parser + HTTP integration invariants for out-of-order timestamps and recovery.

steps.name: fixture-hygiene
steps.note: Runs TerraV1 fixture suite to validate schema/runtime fixture integrity and package resource wiring.

steps.name: static-audits
steps.note: Verifies terra.v1 contract source and 403/400 reject semantics in OTLP server.
